ValidationRule.description: created as part of BIZ-48776. BIZ-46111,BIZ-61614
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL( Quote_Stage__c , 'Contract Executed')) && (NOT(ISPICKVAL(ApprovalStatus__c ,'Approved'))) && (NOT(ISPICKVAL(ApprovalStatus__c ,'Not Required'))) && (NOT(ISPICKVAL( Renewal_Quote_Type__c ,'Auto-Renewal'))) && (NOT(ISPICKVAL( Deal_Type__c ,'Other')))&& (NOT(ISPICKVAL( Deal_Type__c ,'Amendment_to_Supercede')))&& (NOT(ISPICKVAL( Deal_Type__c ,'Cancellation'))) && $User.Email != "manuela.lorenzi-kayser@intapp.com"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This quote requires a signed OSA. Please submit for Approvals and generate OSA.
